rawIntent: Add a string-case utility module under src/shared/utils/string-case with two pure functions: kebabCase(s: string): string and camelCase(s: string): string. No DB, no API, no logging. Unit tests only.

successCriteria.description: The module src/shared/utils/string-case contains two pure functions: kebabCase and camelCase, both of which correctly transform strings as specified.
